meaning: adj.散文的,散文体的,平凡的
examples: The alternative explanation is more prosaic.
Dimensions of experience excluded as prosaic.
But amid all the celebration it is worth asking a prosaic question.
In the prosaic world of real estate marketing Mark Segal and Jeffrey Jones have found a rarefied perch.
It sounds prosaic, but it's the first thing a planner will want you to do.
